errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the protocol authority

errors.name: WrongEpoch
errors.msg: Epoch argument does not match current on-chain epoch

errors.name: EpochNotEnded
errors.msg: Epoch has not ended yet — claim after the epoch rolls over

errors.name: VoteOverflow
errors.msg: Vote amount exceeds available hiSOLA balance for this epoch
